# BriefTube

BriefTube is an AI-powered YouTube summarizer that helps users quickly understand YouTube videos using artificial intelligence.

Website:
https://brieftube.co

Purpose:
Generate YouTube summaries, transcripts and study notes using AI.

Main Pages
https://brieftube.co/
https://brieftube.co/blog
https://brieftube.co/about
https://brieftube.co/contact
https://brieftube.co/faq
